text.title: LB Layer Selection Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (protocol, content routing, TLS strategy, anycast) to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the design need content-based routing OR TLS termination at the LB OR WAF OR API-gateway features?

branch.question: Anycast or cross-zone L3 distribution required?

conclusion.verdict: hybrid: L4 anycast front (NLB / Global Accelerator) + L7 (ALB / Ingress) behind
pure L7 (ALB / Ingress / HAProxy mode http)
reject design; clarify whether L7 features are actually needed
upgrade to L7 OR switch to L4 pass-through

text.example: needs_l7_features=true (path-routing + WAF) → anycast=false → pure L7 → satisfies l7-required-for-content-routing.
